Notice Of Motion An Dmotion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-30-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS MARIANNE BECK, PHIL HEAD, KURT MUELLER, RYAN MCCAULEY, and, JOHN TYNAN, Motion for Leave to File First Amended Complaint. Appearances: Raquel Fox, Esq. Tenderloin Housing Clinic (415) 771-9850, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party; James Brandan Kraus, Esq. of Zacks & Utrecht (415) 956-8100, appearing for Defendants and opposing party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is granted, in view of defendant's non-opposition to amendment, per se. Amended complaint will be filed and served. Order signed in open Court. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

Defendant Prana Eight Properties, Llc'S Motion To Strike Complaint (Continued From 06/29/10 To 06/30/10)
Off Calendar Jun-30-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendant Prana Eight Properties, LLC's Special Motion to Strike Complaint (Continued From 06/29/10 To 06/30/10). Appearances: Raquel Fox, Esq. Tenderloin Housing Clinic (415) 771-9850, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; James Brandan Kraus, Esq. of Zacks & Utrecht (415) 956-8100, appearing for Defendants and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is granted, no opposition filed. Defendant may bring a separate motion for attorney fees and costs. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-29-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT PRANA EIGHT PROPERTIES, LLC, MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is continued to 6/30/2010 to be heard with related motions. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
